Interface IObject

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to the class the row belongs to.

[Guid("1AFCDB34-AC09-11D2-8A1E-006097AFF44E")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IObject : IRow, IRowBuffer

Properties

Class

The Object Class for the row.

IObjectClass
